mapper.select:
SELECT b.*, COALESCE(l.like_cnt, 0) AS likecnt FROM tb_board b LEFT JOIN ( SELECT board_idx, COUNT(*) AS like_cnt FROM tb_board_like GROUP BY board_idx ) l ON b.idx = l.board_idx
AND b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND b.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND b.writer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY b.created_at DESC, b.idx DESC
ORDER BY b.created_at ASC, idx ASC
ORDER BY b.view_cnt DESC, b.created_at DESC, b.idx DESC
ORDER BY b.view_cnt ASC, b.created_at DESC, b.idx DESC
ORDER BY b.created_at DESC, b.idx DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_board_like WHERE board_idx = #{idx}
SELECT m.user_id AS userId, m.user_name AS userName FROM tb_board_like bl INNER JOIN members m ON bl.user_id = m.user_id WHERE bl.board_idx = #{idx} ORDER BY bl.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_board (title, content, writer, user_id, board_pw, view_cnt, created_at, updated_at) Values (#{title}, #{content}, #{writer}, #{userId}, #{boardPw}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_board SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() where idx = #{idx}
mapper.select:
SELECT count(*) FROM tb_board
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND writer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
